name: Festive Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Low sodium chicken broth (10 1/2 oz each)
1 1/2 cups Julienne cut red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium non-stick saucepan, bring broth to boil.
2. Add rice. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in 4 tablespoons Molly McButter and all vegetables. Cover and continue cooking for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and let stand 5 minutes, or until water is absorbed.
5. Sprinkle with remaining Molly McButter and pepper to taste.
6. Fluff with fork and serve. Makes 8 servings.
